_doc: Source citations for every customer-facing claim, testimonial, and stat on the Miranda AC Replacement landing page. Required by AGENTS.md Builds Lane R6 (Content Authenticity & FTC).

testimonials.name: John Conti
testimonials.text: Always prompt and reliable. Even on Saturdays. Great tech. I'll recommend Miranda to everyone. They truly are the BEST.
testimonials.extraction_method: Real review imported from Trustindex Google reviews widget on mirandahomeservices.com homepage. AC-relevance: generic positive customer experience (no specific service called out — safe for AC LP).

testimonials.name: Bette Goodwin
testimonials.text: Tim did a great job. Very personable, professional, knowledgeable, thorough and super friendly. Did an outstanding job. Thank you Miranda for having an awesome tech.
testimonials.extraction_method: Real review imported from Trustindex Google reviews widget on mirandahomeservices.com homepage. AC-relevance: generic positive technician experience (no specific service called out — safe for AC LP). Period after 'friendly' added to match source punctuation style; original used comma.

testimonials.name: Michael Groves
testimonials.text: Miranda is always very thorough and professional. Highly recommend from office personnel to techs in the field.
testimonials.extraction_method: Real review imported from Trustindex Google reviews widget on mirandahomeservices.com homepage. AC-relevance: generic positive technician experience (no specific service called out — safe for AC LP).

rework_history.qa_feedback: Fabricated testimonials (Sarah M./David R./Jennifer K.) — replaced with 3 real Google reviews from Miranda's own site. 10K+ stat unverified — removed. content-sources.json file did not exist — created.
